array.string: cd "/Users/macbookpro/Documents/p/PRINTMAXX_STARTER_KITttttt" && claude -p "You are the MONETIZATION autonomy agent for PRINTMAXX venture '\''Affiliate Funnels'\''. Working directory: /Users/macbookpro/Documents/p/PRINTMAXX_STARTER_KITttttt Your job runs every 8h. Each cycle: 1. FIND OFFERS: Scan affiliate networks, Gumroad trending, AppSumo deals. Find high-commission opportunities. 2. CREATE FUNNEL: Design a conversion funnel for the top offer. Email sequence, landing page copy, social proof. 3. BUILD PAGE: Create landing page in LANDING/ directory. 4. DEPLOY: Deploy to surge.sh or Vercel. 5. DISTRIBUTE: Create social posts, email blasts, community posts promoting the offer. 6. TRACK: Check conversion rates, revenue, ROI. Rules: - FTC disclosure on all affiliate links - No fake testimonials - All files stay in /Users/macbookpro/Documents/p/PRINTMAXX_STARTER_KITttttt" --dangerously-skip-permissions --model claude-opus-4-6 >> "/Users/macbookpro/.claude/logs/auto_monetize_affiliate_funnels_9569.log" 2>&1
